questionHtml:
An object of mass m at the end of a string of length r moves in a vertical circle at a constant angular speed ω.

What is the tension in the string when the object is at the bottom of the circle?

A.     m(ω2r + g)

B.     m(ω2r – g)

C.     mg(ω2r + 1)

D.     mg(ω2r – 1)

meta.title: An object of mass m at the end of a string of length r moves in a vertical circle at a constant angular speed ω. What is the tension in the string when the object is at the bottom
